title: Storz & Bickel Unveils VEAZY Compact Vaporizer
text: Storz & Bickel generated approximately CAD 23 million in revenue according to recent financial data from Canopy Growth. However, the vaporizer segment recently faced headwinds, with revenues falling 25% year over year. Management attributed this to tough economic conditions, softer consumer demand, and strong sales comparisons from the prior year. The segment's gross margin shrank by 10 percentage points year over year, with higher manufacturing costs and headcount reductions underway to support future margin recovery. Despite recent declines, CGC focused on turning the business around with new product launches planned for the second half of calendar year 2025, including the VEAZY, a compact and accessible vaporizer. Storz & Bickel is positioned as a device business with premium positioning and historically attractive margins.
